Precondition: red_block is on top of green_block and both end-effectors are free.
Postcondition: red_block is securely grasped with both end-effectors.

Precondition: red_block is held by both end-effectors and a free area to the right of green_block on the table is available.
Postcondition: red_block is placed on the table to the right of green_block and both end-effectors are released.

Precondition: green_block is fully accessible on the table and the right end-effector is free.
Postcondition: green_block is grasped by the right end-effector.
